summary: Settlements Tab redesign tested successfully. Backend endpoint GET /api/distributors/{id}/settlement-preview returns correct structure with deliveries, credit_notes, factory_returns, and summary. Frontend SettlementsTab.jsx renders all 3 summary cards, payout formula bar with dark background, and 3 detail tables correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_settlement_preview.py - New test file for settlement-preview endpoint

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - test distributor has no deliveries/credit notes/factory returns for current period
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settlement-preview endpoint and SettlementsTab redesign are working correctly. The endpoint returns {deliveries: [], credit_notes: [], factory_returns: [], summary: {...}} structure. Frontend shows 3 summary cards (Deliveries, Credit Notes, Factory Returns), payout formula bar with dark bg-slate-900 background, and 3 detail tables. Generate Settlement button is disabled when no data exists. Month/Year filters work on settlements list. Empty state shows 'No settlements yet' message.

verified: GET /api/distributors/{id}/settlement-preview?month=X&year=Y returns 200
Response contains deliveries, credit_notes, factory_returns arrays
Response contains summary with total_deliveries, total_delivery_amount, total_credit_notes, total_credit_note_amount, total_factory_returns, total_factory_return_amount
Deliveries include items array
Missing params return 422 validation error
Works for different months (1, 6, 12)
CardDescription shows 'Deliveries + Credit Notes + Factory Returns = Net Payout'
3 summary cards: Deliveries (Dist to Customer), Credit Notes (Factory to Dist), Factory Returns (Factory to Dist)
Payout formula bar with dark bg-slate-900 background
Formula shows: Earnings - Price Adj + Credit Notes + Factory Returns = Net Payout
3 detail tables: Deliveries by Account, Credit Notes (Customer Returns Reimbursement), Factory Returns (Warehouse Stock Return Credit)
Generate Settlement button disabled when no data
Month/Year filter dropdowns present
Empty state shows 'No settlements yet' message
Grand totals bar has data-testid='settlement-grand-totals'
